h1.visual_description: Centered, red serif font, medium weight, located at the top of the page content area.

h2.visual_description: Left-aligned, orange sans-serif font, larger than body text, positioned above main paragraphs.
h2.example_text: Growth and the Creation of Life

h3.visual_description: White, bold serif font on a solid red background (sidebar context).

visual_matchers.pattern: Solid red vertical column on the right side of the page containing circular images and white text.
Thin horizontal white lines within the red sidebar.
Images with a subtle drop shadow and white border frame.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Inline LaTeX for biological phases and chemical notations (e.g., $G_1$, $S$, $G_2$)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Not explicitly shown; assume standard academic parenthetical if present in full text.

layout_info.primary_flow: Two-column asymmetrical (Main content 75% width, Sidebar 25% width)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Header: 'MOHAVE COMMUNITY COLLEGE' (left) and 'BIO181' (right) separated by a red horizontal rule. Footer: Centered red page number.
